title: Vocabulary Administration
description: Upload and manage OMOP vocabulary bundles downloaded from Athena (athena.ohdsi.org). The import runs as a background job and supports ZIP files up to 5 GB. You can track import progress in real time, view logs, and maintain a full history of all vocabulary imports.
tips: Download your vocabulary bundle from athena.ohdsi.org first: sign in, select the domains you need (SNOMED, RxNorm, LOINC, etc.), and download the ZIP file Athena emails you.
Drag and drop the Athena ZIP file onto the upload zone, or click to browse. Only .zip files are accepted.
Only one vocabulary import can run at a time. The upload form is disabled while an import is in progress.
Optionally select a target CDM source to control which vocabulary schema receives the imported data. If no source is selected, the default vocab schema is used.
Import jobs run in the background and can take 15 to 60 minutes depending on the size of the vocabulary bundle.
Expand the Import Log section on any import card to see detailed progress output and troubleshoot issues.
The import list auto-refreshes every 10 seconds so you can monitor active jobs without manually refreshing.
Completed or failed imports can be removed from the history using the Remove button on each card.
